TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Rikisi_no_Awto, title = Rikisi_no_Awto, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rikisi_no_Awto} }

S.FORM: Rikisi no Awto I ka'ayaway no kairaan no tamdaw a rikisi Ma'edeng i'ayaw no 5 ofad komiheca, ila'enoay ho no sera to cecay a so'ot ko raya' ko riyar, sa malalitingay ho ato Niukiniya, Sumatora ato Tasmaniya a kanatal, o kalala'ed ato Aciya a ta'eman riyar madihocay ho, sa lahodayay ho ko rakat no tamina. O Yincumin no i lawacay a pala ma'edengay ho a milakec a tayni i Awto. I 2014 miheca mahera ko samatelangay a malafokelohay to a 'okak, hinamen 'i, i'ayaway no 4 ofad ira ko tosa apatek ko kaliteng nona ci Munkoman hananay ko pangangan a fainayan a tamdaw sanany ko piketon to sowal no mikakinkiway. Onini to ko hawacay o rikisi no Ostorariya 'i, o dengan ono Yincumin a rikisi sanay to ko kaketon no sowal. O hawacay tonini 'i, o naikoran no paloma'an, okak no tamdaw, o mikunisan a maamaan, sa adihay ko kitod pakayni to 'orip no Ostotatiya Yincumin. O sowal no samato'asay no Yincumin no Awto o Kukaprak(Kukabrak) finacadan o pana' ato micideman ko ka'ayaw a tamina ko sapilood I 'ayaw no 11,000 miheca tahiniay to pahicera I Ostorariya ato satimalan Amirika, mataliyokay to cikiw sanay ko sowal. To ikor to sa'aloman sato ko tayniay a mihahinahinamay to maamaan a tamdaw no Yoropa, ma'eco to ko kaitiraan no kina'orip, o tata'angay a a'adopen,tata'angay ma'eferay 'ayam, o komaenay to a'adopen a kangkaro(kangaroo袋鼠), o limaay laya' ko kato'edaw a kaloda'ay,matiya o mamangay a tosya a rarokoh, ano sa'osien ma'edeng ira ko 60 ko kasasiromaroma no kina'orip ko malahedaway. O pakimad no Yincumin no Awto'i, i'ayaw no 13,000 miheca fahal sanay a malahedaw ko ciso'edaay a sera ato palapalaan sanay, oya malakitingay ho Ostorariya ato Tasmaniya kanatal madawdaw to no riyar, sa ira to koya Pasu riyaran ta'eman. O pakongko no Yincumin ya malahedaw ko so'eda, fa'edet to ko romi'ad ta macakat ko riyar matahepo ko pala o foting nani kafekang a matefad, ira ho ko cunami ko midawdaway to sera, orasaka, masa'iked ko Tasmaniya a kanatal, o maro'ay itini a Yincumin ma'osaw to a masi'iked, oni ko kalahedaw no maro'ay i saowac no Pasu riyaran ta'eman ato i Kankarruay kanatl a Yincumin i'ayaw no 9,000 miheca. Tayni ko Yoropa a tamdaw Naka awaan no so'eda 'i, macakat ko riyar sa tata'ang ko tapelik, i 16sici a cicu no nitahepoan no kakarayan pangangan sa to Ostorariya o Terra Australis Incognita hananay,"awaay ho ko kafanafana'an a pala i satimolan"sanay ko tatodong nona sowal. 1606 miheca, sa'ayaway a macakat tona pala a Yoropa tamdaw o Olanta a tamdaw ci Oiliyam Yancyon (Willem Janszoon).1770 miheca o Sokolan a tamdaw ci Cimos Kuku itira i Sitoni a macakat, nengneng han nira o tada makapahay a pala itini, sa namacakat tangsol sa a pakido a milekal to ono niyam a pala konini saan, itini to ko pisatapang no kohecalay tamdaw a tayni mafolaw a paloma' misaoamah, ona pala 'i, pangangan han tono Ikiris a ngangan to "Niw Saos Oyrusu"(ona ngangan 'i,o fa'elohay a satimolan Oyrusu, nawhani, itira i Ikiris iraay ko Oyrusu hananay a sakowan). 1788 miheca, satapang ko pikowan no Ikiris ton apala, i sa'aya'ayaw ho 'i, o pirofoan to maparitay no Ikiris, oya sa'ayaway a nipataynian a maparitay 'i, 1030 ko tamdaw, i laloma' nonini 736 ko maparitay(586 ko fainayan, 242 ko fafahiyan),o osaw 'i,sahetoay o pakoyoc a tamdaw, o pifalah to a taynien. 10791 miheca 1017 ko maparitay a taynien, caho ka pahicera itini tona pala 281 tamdaw ko mapatayay i fatad no riyar, nikawrira, cango'oten to kakaenen tona sakowan, hai han to no Ikiris sifo ko kalotamdaw a tayni mafolaw a maomah. Naka taynian no kohecalay tamdaw ton apala, o tasaraman han ko Yincumin a mi'adop a mipatay, corcoren ho sifo a mipapatay ko Yincumin, sa itira i Tasmaniya a kanatal lowan sanay to ko Yincumin.Tahira to i 1830 miheca, awaay to ko 'osaw no caay ka ciramram to remes no Yincumin no Tasmaniya kanatal. O pilood to kohetingay tamdaw hananay a pangangan ko nini. 1851 miheca satapang ko nani Yoropaay ato nani Ciwkoku a tamdaw a mafolaw tayni a mamatayal nona kitakit, i 1950miheca sa'osien ko polong to nani cowacowaay a tamdaw itini 'i,200 ofad, 'odeng ko Holam aca ko sa'osien 'i, toloay ofad, wa sa'adihay 'adihay a sa matongal ko Holan tamdaw sa a lacemcem ko kohecalay tamdaw, satapang to a milaplap, o kohecalay tamdaw ko kakakaenen saan. Ikor no Pisiiked-Niyahpikowan I 1901 miheca mapalasawad ko pikowan no Ikiris siiked sato Niyahpikowan, nikawrira, sahetoay o teloc no Ikiris ko tatapangan a mafolaw a tayni, caay ka pisawad to o Honti niyam ko Ikiris a honti saan, oraka, i sakacecay a lalood no nitahepoan no kakarayan malakapot ko Ostorariya ato Niwcila(ANZAC), cacamol sa to sofitay no Ikiris ato Fransu milood to Osman hontian kitakit. Ikor to no lalood 'i, mala'afaw ko Sitoni niyaro' ato Mirporon to saka malatatpangan a niyaro' no kitakit, cakafilo kona tosa a niyaro' awaway ko misododay, ora to ko sanga' han i sifo' nona taos a niyaro' ko fa'elohay a halatatapangan niyaro' no kitakit oya Kiyanpira a niyaro'. Na malaheci ko sakatosa a lalood no nitahepoan no kakarayan, wataay ko kalowan no tamdaw, o kohecalay sa tamdaw 'i, mana'ay to a maro' itini, malowan to ko malinahay a tayni nani Yoropa. Orasaka, i 1980 miheca sawaden to koya o ikakaay ko kohecalay tamdaw sanay a demak, mitahidang to icowacowaay a tamdaw a tayni mafolaw, oya"kasasiromaroma a punka a demak"hananay. Nikawrira, ano masamaamaan to ko nika raay ato Yoropa ato Amirika, ano masamaamaan to ko nika 'aloman no roma a finacadan a mafolaw a tayni,cowa ka tawal ko cecaay ko keton no pona sanay a harateng, malecaday ko remes o Ankuro Sakusong Finacadan(Anglo-Saxons,onini 'i, o Ikiris,Amirika, Kanata, Ostorariya ato Niwcila a kohecalay tamdaw koni toro'an) kita sanay afaloco' nangra a misakakinih to roma a finacadan. Nikawria, caay ka matiya o saka'amis pecih no cikiw aYoropa ko wayway nangra ano roma, patinako han yo mihapinang to 'icel no kinsipakotan ko Frasu i satimolan no Taypinyang i ngata no Ostorariya ato Niwcilan 'i, caay to kafilo ko kaci'icel nona tosa a kitakit a mihantay tona mihapinang to 'icel no kinsipakotan saany a demak no Fransu,o kalotamdaw 'i,mana'ay a micakay to dafong no Fransu, i tata'angay a niyaro' 'i, mapala'idef ko patiyamay no Fransu.
S.PHON: rikisi no~u awto~u i kaʡajawaj no~u kairaan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a rikisi maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ iʡajaw no~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~umiħəʦa, iɾaʡəno~uaj ħo~u no~u səra to~u ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut ko~u rajaʡ ko~u rijar, sa maɾaɾitiŋaj ħo~u ato~u nio~u~ukinija, so~u~umato~ura ato~u tasmanija a kanataɾ, o~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u aʦija a taʡəman rijar maɬ~ɮiħo~uʦaj ħo~u, sa ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ħo~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina. o~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u i ɾawaʦaj a paɾa maʡəɬ~ɮəŋaj ħo~u a miɾakəʦ a tajni i awto~u. i **** miħəʦa maħəra ko~u samatəɾaŋaj a maɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj to~u a ʡo~ukak, ħinamən ʡi, iʡajawaj no~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u to~usa apatək ko~u kaɾitəŋ no~una ʦi mo~u~unko~uman ħananaj ko~u paŋaŋan a fainajan a tamɬ~ɮaw sananj ko~u pikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ no~u mikakinkiwaj. o~unini to~u ko~u ħawaʦaj o~u rikisi no~u o~usto~urarija ʡi, o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan o~uno~u jinʦo~u~umin a rikisi sanaj to~u ko~u kakəto~un no~u so~uwaɾ. o~u ħawaʦaj to~unini ʡi, o~u naiko~uran no~u paɾo~umaʡan, o~ukak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u miko~u~unisan a maamaan, sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kito~uɬ~ɮ pakajni to~u ʡo~urip no~u o~usto~utatija jinʦo~u~umin. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u samato~uʡasaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u awto~u o~u ko~u~ukaprak(ko~u~ukab~b~vrak) finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u panaʡ ato~u miʦiɬ~ɮəman ko~u kaʡajaw a tamina ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʡajaw no~u **,*** miħəʦa taħiniaj to~u paħiʦəra i o~usto~urarija ato~u satimaɾan amirika, mataɾijo~ukaj to~u ʦikiw sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ. to~u iko~ur to~u saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u tajniaj a miħaħinaħinamaj to~u maamaan a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jo~uro~upa, maʡəʦo~u to~u ko~u kaitiraan no~u kinaʡo~urip, o~u tataʡaŋaj a aʡaɬ~ɮo~upən,tataʡaŋaj maʡəfəraj ʡajam, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u aʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a kaŋkaro~u(kaŋaro~uo~u**), o~u ɾimaaj ɾajaʡ ko~u kato~uʡəɬ~ɮaw a kaɾo~uɬ~ɮaʡaj,matija o~u mamaŋaj a to~usja a raro~uko~uħ, ano~u saʡo~usiən maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ ira ko~u ** ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u kinaʡo~urip ko~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj. o~u pakimaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u awto~uʡi, iʡajaw no~u **,*** miħəʦa faħaɾ sanaj a maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦiso~uʡəɬ~ɮaaj a səra ato~u paɾapaɾaan sanaj, o~uja maɾakitiŋaj ħo~u o~usto~urarija ato~u tasmanija kanataɾ maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~u no~u rijar, sa ira to~u ko~uja paso~u~u rijaran taʡəman. o~u pako~uŋko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin ja maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uʡəɬ~ɮa, faʡəɬ~ɮət to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ta maʦakat ko~u rijar mataħəpo~u ko~u paɾa o~u fo~utiŋ nani kafəkaŋ a matəfaɬ~ɮ, ira ħo~u ko~u ʦo~u~unami ko~u miɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮawaj to~u səra, o~urasaka, masaʡikəɬ~ɮ ko~u tasmanija a kanataɾ, o~u maro~uʡaj itini a jinʦo~u~umin maʡo~usaw to~u a masiʡikəɬ~ɮ, o~uni ko~u kaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw no~u maro~uʡaj i sao~uwaʦ no~u paso~u~u rijaran taʡəman ato~u i kankarro~u~uaj kanatɾ a jinʦo~u~umin iʡajaw no~u *,*** miħəʦa. tajni ko~u jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw naka awaan no~u so~uʡəɬ~ɮa ʡi, maʦakat ko~u rijar sa tataʡaŋ ko~u tapəɾik, i **siʦi a ʦiʦo~u~u no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan paŋaŋan sa to~u o~usto~urarija o~u tərra ao~u~ustraɾis inʦo~u*nita ħananaj,"awaaj ħo~u ko~u kafanafanaʡan a paɾa i satimo~uɾan"sanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~una so~uwaɾ. **** miħəʦa, saʡajawaj a maʦakat to~una paɾa a jo~uro~upa tamɬ~ɮaw o~u o~uɾanta a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi o~uiɾijam janʦjo~un (wiɾɾəm *ans*o~uo~un).**** miħəʦa o~u so~uko~uɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦimo~us ko~u~uko~u~u itira i sito~uni a maʦakat, nəŋnəŋ ħan nira o~u taɬ~ɮa makapaħaj a paɾa itini, sa namaʦakat taŋso~uɾ sa a pakiɬ~ɮo~u a miɾəkaɾ to~u o~uno~u nijam a paɾa ko~unini saan, itini to~u ko~u pisatapaŋ no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw a paɾo~umaʡ misao~uamaħ, o~una paɾa ʡi, paŋaŋan ħan to~uno~u ikiris a ŋaŋan to~u "niw sao~us o~ujro~u~uso~u~u"(o~una ŋaŋan ʡi,o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a satimo~uɾan o~ujro~u~uso~u~u, nawħani, itira i ikiris iraaj ko~u o~ujro~u~uso~u~u ħananaj a sako~uwan). **** miħəʦa, satapaŋ ko~u piko~uwan no~u ikiris to~un apaɾa, i saʡajaʡajaw ħo~u ʡi, o~u piro~ufo~uan to~u maparitaj no~u ikiris, o~uja saʡajawaj a nipatajnian a maparitaj ʡi, **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~unini *** ko~u maparitaj(*** ko~u fainajan, *** ko~u fafaħijan),o~u o~usaw ʡi,saħəto~uaj o~u pako~ujo~uʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u pifaɾaħ to~u a tajniən. ***** miħəʦa **** ko~u maparitaj a tajniən, ʦaħo~u ka paħiʦəra itini to~una paɾa *** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mapatajaj i fataɬ~ɮ no~u rijar, nikawrira, ʦaŋo~uʡo~utən to~u kakaənən to~una sako~uwan, ħai ħan to~u no~u ikiris sifo~u ko~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw a mao~umaħ. naka tajnian no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~un apaɾa, o~u tasaraman ħan ko~u jinʦo~u~umin a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up a mipataj, ʦo~urʦo~urən ħo~u sifo~u a mipapataj ko~u jinʦo~u~umin, sa itira i tasmanija a kanataɾ ɾo~uwan sanaj to~u ko~u jinʦo~u~umin.taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa, awaaj to~u ko~u ʡo~usaw no~u ʦaaj ka ʦiramram to~u rəməs no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tasmanija kanataɾ. o~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħananaj a paŋaŋan ko~u nini. **** miħəʦa satapaŋ ko~u nani jo~uro~upaaj ato~u nani ʦiwko~uko~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw a mafo~uɾaw tajni a mamatajaɾ no~una kitakit, i ****miħəʦa saʡo~usiən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ to~u nani ʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw itini ʡi,*** o~ufaɬ~ɮ, ʡo~uɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u ħo~uɾam aʦa ko~u saʡo~usiən ʡi, to~uɾo~uaj o~ufaɬ~ɮ, wa saʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj a sa mato~uŋaɾ ko~u ħo~uɾan tamɬ~ɮaw sa a ɾaʦəmʦəm ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw, satapaŋ to~u a miɾapɾap, o~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kakakaənən saan. iko~ur no~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ-nijaħpiko~uwan i **** miħəʦa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u piko~uwan no~u ikiris siikəɬ~ɮ sato~u nijaħpiko~uwan, nikawrira, saħəto~uaj o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u ikiris ko~u tatapaŋan a mafo~uɾaw a tajni, ʦaaj ka pisawaɬ~ɮ to~u o~u ħo~unti nijam ko~u ikiris a ħo~unti saan, o~uraka, i sakaʦəʦaj a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan maɾakapo~ut ko~u o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾa(an*aʦ), ʦaʦamo~uɾ sa to~u so~ufitaj no~u ikiris ato~u franso~u~u miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u o~usman ħo~untian kitakit. iko~ur to~u no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʡi, maɾaʡafaw ko~u sito~uni nijaro~uʡ ato~u mirpo~uro~un to~u saka maɾatatpaŋan a nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit, ʦakafiɾo~u ko~una to~usa a nijaro~uʡ awawaj ko~u miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~ura to~u ko~u saŋaʡ ħan i sifo~uʡ no~una tao~us a nijaro~uʡ ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a ħaɾatatapaŋan nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit o~uja kijanpira a nijaro~uʡ. na maɾaħəʦi ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan, wataaj ko~u kaɾo~uwan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj sa tamɬ~ɮaw ʡi, manaʡaj to~u a maro~uʡ itini, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u maɾinaħaj a tajni nani jo~uro~upa. o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa sawaɬ~ɮən to~u ko~uja o~u ikakaaj ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw, o~uja"kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~u~unka a ɬ~ɮəmak"ħananaj. nikawrira, ano~u masamaamaan to~u ko~u nika raaj ato~u jo~uro~upa ato~u amirika, ano~u masamaamaan to~u ko~u nika ʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a mafo~uɾaw a tajni,ʦo~uwa ka tawaɾ ko~u ʦəʦaaj ko~u kəto~un no~u po~una sanaj a ħaratəŋ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u rəməs o~u anko~u~uro~u sako~u~uso~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(aŋɾo~u-saxo~uns,o~unini ʡi, o~u ikiris,amirika, kanata, o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾa a ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~uni to~uro~uʡan) kita sanaj afaɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra a misakakiniħ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. nikawria, ʦaaj ka matija o~u sakaʡamis pəʦiħ no~u ʦikiw ajo~uro~upa ko~u wajwaj naŋra ano~u ro~uma, patinako~u ħan jo~u miħapinaŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kinsipako~utan ko~u fraso~u~u i satimo~uɾan no~u tajpinjaŋ i ŋata no~u o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾan ʡi, ʦaaj to~u kafiɾo~u ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ no~una to~usa a kitakit a miħantaj to~una miħapinaŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kinsipako~utan saanj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u franso~u~u,o~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw ʡi,manaʡaj a miʦakaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u franso~u~u, i tataʡaŋaj a nijaro~uʡ ʡi, mapaɾaʡiɬ~ɮəf ko~u patijamaj no~u franso~u~u.
S.FORM: Rikisi no Awto I ka'ayaway no kairaan no tamdaw a rikisi Ma'edeng i'ayaw no 5 ofad komiheca, ila'enoay ho no sera to cecay a so'ot ko raya' ko riyar, sa malalitingay ho ato Niukiniya, Sumatora ato Tasmaniya a kanatal, o kalala'ed ato Aciya a ta'eman riyar madihocay ho, sa lahodayay ho ko rakat no tamina. O Yincumin no i lawacay a pala ma'edengay ho a milakec a tayni i Awto. I 2014 miheca mahera ko samatelangay a malafokelohay to a 'okak, hinamen 'i, i'ayaway no 4 ofad ira ko tosa apatek ko kaliteng nona ci Munkoman hananay ko pangangan a fainayan a tamdaw sanany ko piketon to sowal no mikakinkiway. Onini to ko hawacay o rikisi no Ostorariya 'i, o dengan ono Yincumin a rikisi sanay to ko kaketon no sowal. O hawacay tonini 'i, o naikoran no paloma'an, okak no tamdaw, o mikunisan a maamaan, sa adihay ko kitod pakayni to 'orip no Ostotatiya Yincumin. O sowal no samato'asay no Yincumin no Awto o Kukaprak(Kukabrak) finacadan o pana' ato micideman ko ka'ayaw a tamina ko sapilood I 'ayaw no 11,000 miheca tahiniay to pahicera I Ostorariya ato satimalan Amirika, mataliyokay to cikiw sanay ko sowal. To ikor to sa'aloman sato ko tayniay a mihahinahinamay to maamaan a tamdaw no Yoropa, ma'eco to ko kaitiraan no kina'orip, o tata'angay a a'adopen,tata'angay ma'eferay 'ayam, o komaenay to a'adopen a kangkaro(kangaroo袋鼠), o limaay laya' ko kato'edaw a kaloda'ay,matiya o mamangay a tosya a rarokoh, ano sa'osien ma'edeng ira ko 60 ko kasasiromaroma no kina'orip ko malahedaway. O pakimad no Yincumin no Awto'i, i'ayaw no 13,000 miheca fahal sanay a malahedaw ko ciso'edaay a sera ato palapalaan sanay, oya malakitingay ho Ostorariya ato Tasmaniya kanatal madawdaw to no riyar, sa ira to koya Pasu riyaran ta'eman. O pakongko no Yincumin ya malahedaw ko so'eda, fa'edet to ko romi'ad ta macakat ko riyar matahepo ko pala o foting nani kafekang a matefad, ira ho ko cunami ko midawdaway to sera, orasaka, masa'iked ko Tasmaniya a kanatal, o maro'ay itini a Yincumin ma'osaw to a masi'iked, oni ko kalahedaw no maro'ay i saowac no Pasu riyaran ta'eman ato i Kankarruay kanatl a Yincumin i'ayaw no 9,000 miheca. Tayni ko Yoropa a tamdaw Naka awaan no so'eda 'i, macakat ko riyar sa tata'ang ko tapelik, i 16sici a cicu no nitahepoan no kakarayan pangangan sa to Ostorariya o Terra Australis Incognita hananay,"awaay ho ko kafanafana'an a pala i satimolan"sanay ko tatodong nona sowal. 1606 miheca, sa'ayaway a macakat tona pala a Yoropa tamdaw o Olanta a tamdaw ci Oiliyam Yancyon (Willem Janszoon).1770 miheca o Sokolan a tamdaw ci Cimos Kuku itira i Sitoni a macakat, nengneng han nira o tada makapahay a pala itini, sa namacakat tangsol sa a pakido a milekal to ono niyam a pala konini saan, itini to ko pisatapang no kohecalay tamdaw a tayni mafolaw a paloma' misaoamah, ona pala 'i, pangangan han tono Ikiris a ngangan to "Niw Saos Oyrusu"(ona ngangan 'i,o fa'elohay a satimolan Oyrusu, nawhani, itira i Ikiris iraay ko Oyrusu hananay a sakowan). 1788 miheca, satapang ko pikowan no Ikiris ton apala, i sa'aya'ayaw ho 'i, o pirofoan to maparitay no Ikiris, oya sa'ayaway a nipataynian a maparitay 'i, 1030 ko tamdaw, i laloma' nonini 736 ko maparitay(586 ko fainayan, 242 ko fafahiyan),o osaw 'i,sahetoay o pakoyoc a tamdaw, o pifalah to a taynien. 10791 miheca 1017 ko maparitay a taynien, caho ka pahicera itini tona pala 281 tamdaw ko mapatayay i fatad no riyar, nikawrira, cango'oten to kakaenen tona sakowan, hai han to no Ikiris sifo ko kalotamdaw a tayni mafolaw a maomah. Naka taynian no kohecalay tamdaw ton apala, o tasaraman han ko Yincumin a mi'adop a mipatay, corcoren ho sifo a mipapatay ko Yincumin, sa itira i Tasmaniya a kanatal lowan sanay to ko Yincumin.Tahira to i 1830 miheca, awaay to ko 'osaw no caay ka ciramram to remes no Yincumin no Tasmaniya kanatal. O pilood to kohetingay tamdaw hananay a pangangan ko nini. 1851 miheca satapang ko nani Yoropaay ato nani Ciwkoku a tamdaw a mafolaw tayni a mamatayal nona kitakit, i 1950miheca sa'osien ko polong to nani cowacowaay a tamdaw itini 'i,200 ofad, 'odeng ko Holam aca ko sa'osien 'i, toloay ofad, wa sa'adihay 'adihay a sa matongal ko Holan tamdaw sa a lacemcem ko kohecalay tamdaw, satapang to a milaplap, o kohecalay tamdaw ko kakakaenen saan. Ikor no Pisiiked-Niyahpikowan I 1901 miheca mapalasawad ko pikowan no Ikiris siiked sato Niyahpikowan, nikawrira, sahetoay o teloc no Ikiris ko tatapangan a mafolaw a tayni, caay ka pisawad to o Honti niyam ko Ikiris a honti saan, oraka, i sakacecay a lalood no nitahepoan no kakarayan malakapot ko Ostorariya ato Niwcila(ANZAC), cacamol sa to sofitay no Ikiris ato Fransu milood to Osman hontian kitakit. Ikor to no lalood 'i, mala'afaw ko Sitoni niyaro' ato Mirporon to saka malatatpangan a niyaro' no kitakit, cakafilo kona tosa a niyaro' awaway ko misododay, ora to ko sanga' han i sifo' nona taos a niyaro' ko fa'elohay a halatatapangan niyaro' no kitakit oya Kiyanpira a niyaro'. Na malaheci ko sakatosa a lalood no nitahepoan no kakarayan, wataay ko kalowan no tamdaw, o kohecalay sa tamdaw 'i, mana'ay to a maro' itini, malowan to ko malinahay a tayni nani Yoropa. Orasaka, i 1980 miheca sawaden to koya o ikakaay ko kohecalay tamdaw sanay a demak, mitahidang to icowacowaay a tamdaw a tayni mafolaw, oya"kasasiromaroma a punka a demak"hananay. Nikawrira, ano masamaamaan to ko nika raay ato Yoropa ato Amirika, ano masamaamaan to ko nika 'aloman no roma a finacadan a mafolaw a tayni,cowa ka tawal ko cecaay ko keton no pona sanay a harateng, malecaday ko remes o Ankuro Sakusong Finacadan(Anglo-Saxons,onini 'i, o Ikiris,Amirika, Kanata, Ostorariya ato Niwcila a kohecalay tamdaw koni toro'an) kita sanay afaloco' nangra a misakakinih to roma a finacadan. Nikawria, caay ka matiya o saka'amis pecih no cikiw aYoropa ko wayway nangra ano roma, patinako han yo mihapinang to 'icel no kinsipakotan ko Frasu i satimolan no Taypinyang i ngata no Ostorariya ato Niwcilan 'i, caay to kafilo ko kaci'icel nona tosa a kitakit a mihantay tona mihapinang to 'icel no kinsipakotan saany a demak no Fransu,o kalotamdaw 'i,mana'ay a micakay to dafong no Fransu, i tata'angay a niyaro' 'i, mapala'idef ko patiyamay no Fransu.
S.PHON: rikisi no~u awto~u i kaʡajawaj no~u kairaan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a rikisi maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ iʡajaw no~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~umiħəʦa, iɾaʡəno~uaj ħo~u no~u səra to~u ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut ko~u rajaʡ ko~u rijar, sa maɾaɾitiŋaj ħo~u ato~u nio~u~ukinija, so~u~umato~ura ato~u tasmanija a kanataɾ, o~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u aʦija a taʡəman rijar maɬ~ɮiħo~uʦaj ħo~u, sa ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ħo~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina. o~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u i ɾawaʦaj a paɾa maʡəɬ~ɮəŋaj ħo~u a miɾakəʦ a tajni i awto~u. i **** miħəʦa maħəra ko~u samatəɾaŋaj a maɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj to~u a ʡo~ukak, ħinamən ʡi, iʡajawaj no~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u to~usa apatək ko~u kaɾitəŋ no~una ʦi mo~u~unko~uman ħananaj ko~u paŋaŋan a fainajan a tamɬ~ɮaw sananj ko~u pikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ no~u mikakinkiwaj. o~unini to~u ko~u ħawaʦaj o~u rikisi no~u o~usto~urarija ʡi, o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan o~uno~u jinʦo~u~umin a rikisi sanaj to~u ko~u kakəto~un no~u so~uwaɾ. o~u ħawaʦaj to~unini ʡi, o~u naiko~uran no~u paɾo~umaʡan, o~ukak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u miko~u~unisan a maamaan, sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kito~uɬ~ɮ pakajni to~u ʡo~urip no~u o~usto~utatija jinʦo~u~umin. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u samato~uʡasaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u awto~u o~u ko~u~ukaprak(ko~u~ukab~b~vrak) finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u panaʡ ato~u miʦiɬ~ɮəman ko~u kaʡajaw a tamina ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʡajaw no~u **,*** miħəʦa taħiniaj to~u paħiʦəra i o~usto~urarija ato~u satimaɾan amirika, mataɾijo~ukaj to~u ʦikiw sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ. to~u iko~ur to~u saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u tajniaj a miħaħinaħinamaj to~u maamaan a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jo~uro~upa, maʡəʦo~u to~u ko~u kaitiraan no~u kinaʡo~urip, o~u tataʡaŋaj a aʡaɬ~ɮo~upən,tataʡaŋaj maʡəfəraj ʡajam, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u aʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a kaŋkaro~u(kaŋaro~uo~u**), o~u ɾimaaj ɾajaʡ ko~u kato~uʡəɬ~ɮaw a kaɾo~uɬ~ɮaʡaj,matija o~u mamaŋaj a to~usja a raro~uko~uħ, ano~u saʡo~usiən maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ ira ko~u ** ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u kinaʡo~urip ko~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj. o~u pakimaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u awto~uʡi, iʡajaw no~u **,*** miħəʦa faħaɾ sanaj a maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦiso~uʡəɬ~ɮaaj a səra ato~u paɾapaɾaan sanaj, o~uja maɾakitiŋaj ħo~u o~usto~urarija ato~u tasmanija kanataɾ maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~u no~u rijar, sa ira to~u ko~uja paso~u~u rijaran taʡəman. o~u pako~uŋko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin ja maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uʡəɬ~ɮa, faʡəɬ~ɮət to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ta maʦakat ko~u rijar mataħəpo~u ko~u paɾa o~u fo~utiŋ nani kafəkaŋ a matəfaɬ~ɮ, ira ħo~u ko~u ʦo~u~unami ko~u miɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮawaj to~u səra, o~urasaka, masaʡikəɬ~ɮ ko~u tasmanija a kanataɾ, o~u maro~uʡaj itini a jinʦo~u~umin maʡo~usaw to~u a masiʡikəɬ~ɮ, o~uni ko~u kaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw no~u maro~uʡaj i sao~uwaʦ no~u paso~u~u rijaran taʡəman ato~u i kankarro~u~uaj kanatɾ a jinʦo~u~umin iʡajaw no~u *,*** miħəʦa. tajni ko~u jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw naka awaan no~u so~uʡəɬ~ɮa ʡi, maʦakat ko~u rijar sa tataʡaŋ ko~u tapəɾik, i **siʦi a ʦiʦo~u~u no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan paŋaŋan sa to~u o~usto~urarija o~u tərra ao~u~ustraɾis inʦo~u*nita ħananaj,"awaaj ħo~u ko~u kafanafanaʡan a paɾa i satimo~uɾan"sanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~una so~uwaɾ. **** miħəʦa, saʡajawaj a maʦakat to~una paɾa a jo~uro~upa tamɬ~ɮaw o~u o~uɾanta a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi o~uiɾijam janʦjo~un (wiɾɾəm *ans*o~uo~un).**** miħəʦa o~u so~uko~uɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦimo~us ko~u~uko~u~u itira i sito~uni a maʦakat, nəŋnəŋ ħan nira o~u taɬ~ɮa makapaħaj a paɾa itini, sa namaʦakat taŋso~uɾ sa a pakiɬ~ɮo~u a miɾəkaɾ to~u o~uno~u nijam a paɾa ko~unini saan, itini to~u ko~u pisatapaŋ no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw a paɾo~umaʡ misao~uamaħ, o~una paɾa ʡi, paŋaŋan ħan to~uno~u ikiris a ŋaŋan to~u "niw sao~us o~ujro~u~uso~u~u"(o~una ŋaŋan ʡi,o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a satimo~uɾan o~ujro~u~uso~u~u, nawħani, itira i ikiris iraaj ko~u o~ujro~u~uso~u~u ħananaj a sako~uwan). **** miħəʦa, satapaŋ ko~u piko~uwan no~u ikiris to~un apaɾa, i saʡajaʡajaw ħo~u ʡi, o~u piro~ufo~uan to~u maparitaj no~u ikiris, o~uja saʡajawaj a nipatajnian a maparitaj ʡi, **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~unini *** ko~u maparitaj(*** ko~u fainajan, *** ko~u fafaħijan),o~u o~usaw ʡi,saħəto~uaj o~u pako~ujo~uʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u pifaɾaħ to~u a tajniən. ***** miħəʦa **** ko~u maparitaj a tajniən, ʦaħo~u ka paħiʦəra itini to~una paɾa *** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mapatajaj i fataɬ~ɮ no~u rijar, nikawrira, ʦaŋo~uʡo~utən to~u kakaənən to~una sako~uwan, ħai ħan to~u no~u ikiris sifo~u ko~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw a mao~umaħ. naka tajnian no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~un apaɾa, o~u tasaraman ħan ko~u jinʦo~u~umin a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up a mipataj, ʦo~urʦo~urən ħo~u sifo~u a mipapataj ko~u jinʦo~u~umin, sa itira i tasmanija a kanataɾ ɾo~uwan sanaj to~u ko~u jinʦo~u~umin.taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa, awaaj to~u ko~u ʡo~usaw no~u ʦaaj ka ʦiramram to~u rəməs no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tasmanija kanataɾ. o~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħananaj a paŋaŋan ko~u nini. **** miħəʦa satapaŋ ko~u nani jo~uro~upaaj ato~u nani ʦiwko~uko~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw a mafo~uɾaw tajni a mamatajaɾ no~una kitakit, i ****miħəʦa saʡo~usiən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ to~u nani ʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw itini ʡi,*** o~ufaɬ~ɮ, ʡo~uɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u ħo~uɾam aʦa ko~u saʡo~usiən ʡi, to~uɾo~uaj o~ufaɬ~ɮ, wa saʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj a sa mato~uŋaɾ ko~u ħo~uɾan tamɬ~ɮaw sa a ɾaʦəmʦəm ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw, satapaŋ to~u a miɾapɾap, o~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kakakaənən saan. iko~ur no~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ-nijaħpiko~uwan i **** miħəʦa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u piko~uwan no~u ikiris siikəɬ~ɮ sato~u nijaħpiko~uwan, nikawrira, saħəto~uaj o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u ikiris ko~u tatapaŋan a mafo~uɾaw a tajni, ʦaaj ka pisawaɬ~ɮ to~u o~u ħo~unti nijam ko~u ikiris a ħo~unti saan, o~uraka, i sakaʦəʦaj a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan maɾakapo~ut ko~u o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾa(an*aʦ), ʦaʦamo~uɾ sa to~u so~ufitaj no~u ikiris ato~u franso~u~u miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u o~usman ħo~untian kitakit. iko~ur to~u no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʡi, maɾaʡafaw ko~u sito~uni nijaro~uʡ ato~u mirpo~uro~un to~u saka maɾatatpaŋan a nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit, ʦakafiɾo~u ko~una to~usa a nijaro~uʡ awawaj ko~u miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~ura to~u ko~u saŋaʡ ħan i sifo~uʡ no~una tao~us a nijaro~uʡ ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a ħaɾatatapaŋan nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit o~uja kijanpira a nijaro~uʡ. na maɾaħəʦi ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nitaħəpo~uan no~u kakarajan, wataaj ko~u kaɾo~uwan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj sa tamɬ~ɮaw ʡi, manaʡaj to~u a maro~uʡ itini, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u maɾinaħaj a tajni nani jo~uro~upa. o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa sawaɬ~ɮən to~u ko~uja o~u ikakaaj ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw a tajni mafo~uɾaw, o~uja"kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~u~unka a ɬ~ɮəmak"ħananaj. nikawrira, ano~u masamaamaan to~u ko~u nika raaj ato~u jo~uro~upa ato~u amirika, ano~u masamaamaan to~u ko~u nika ʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a mafo~uɾaw a tajni,ʦo~uwa ka tawaɾ ko~u ʦəʦaaj ko~u kəto~un no~u po~una sanaj a ħaratəŋ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u rəməs o~u anko~u~uro~u sako~u~uso~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(aŋɾo~u-saxo~uns,o~unini ʡi, o~u ikiris,amirika, kanata, o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾa a ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~uni to~uro~uʡan) kita sanaj afaɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra a misakakiniħ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. nikawria, ʦaaj ka matija o~u sakaʡamis pəʦiħ no~u ʦikiw ajo~uro~upa ko~u wajwaj naŋra ano~u ro~uma, patinako~u ħan jo~u miħapinaŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kinsipako~utan ko~u fraso~u~u i satimo~uɾan no~u tajpinjaŋ i ŋata no~u o~usto~urarija ato~u niwʦiɾan ʡi, ʦaaj to~u kafiɾo~u ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ no~una to~usa a kitakit a miħantaj to~una miħapinaŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kinsipako~utan saanj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u franso~u~u,o~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw ʡi,manaʡaj a miʦakaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u franso~u~u, i tataʡaŋaj a nijaro~uʡ ʡi, mapaɾaʡiɬ~ɮəf ko~u patijamaj no~u franso~u~u.
